threats.title: Fortinet FortiClient EMS Improper Access Control Vulnerability
threats.description: Fortinet FortiClient EMS contains an improper access control vulnerability that may allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute unauthorized code or commands via crafted requests.
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects FortiClient EMS. CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) Code Injection Vulnerability
threats.description: Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) contains a code injection vulnerability that could allow attackers to achieve unauthenticated remote code execution.
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM). CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: Adobe Acrobat and Reader Prototype Pollution Vulnerability
threats.description: Adobe Acrobat and Reader contain a prototype pollution vulnerability that allows for arbitrary code execution.
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects Acrobat and Reader. CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: Fortinet FortiClient EMS SQL Injection Vulnerability
threats.description: Fortinet FortiClient EMS contains a SQL injection vulnerability that may allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute unauthorized code or commands via specifically crafted HTTP requests.
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects FortiClient EMS. CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: Adobe Acrobat Use-After-Free Vulnerability
threats.description: Adobe Acrobat contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows for code execution
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects Acrobat. CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: Microsoft Windows Out-of-Bounds Read Vulnerability
threats.description: Microsoft Windows Common Log File System Driver contains an out-of-bounds read vulnerability that could allow a threat actor for privileges escalation
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects Windows. CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: Microsoft Exchange Server Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
threats.description: Microsoft Exchange Server contains a deserialization of untrusted data that allows an authenticated attacker to achieve remote code execution.
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects Exchange Server. CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: Microsoft Windows Link Following Vulnerability
threats.description: Microsoft Windows contains a link following vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects Windows. CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: Microsoft Visual Basic for Applications Insecure Library Loading Vulnerability
threats.description: Microsoft Visual Basic for Applications (VBA) contains an insecure library loading vulnerability that could allow for remote code execution.
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects Visual Basic for Applications (VBA). CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: Microsoft SharePoint Server Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
threats.description: Microsoft SharePoint Server contains an improper input validation vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to perform spoofing over a network.
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects SharePoint Server. CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: Microsoft Office Remote Code Execution
threats.description: Microsoft Office Excel contains a remote code execution vulnerability that could allow an attacker to take complete control of an affected system if a user opens a specially crafted Excel file that includes a malformed object.
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects Office. CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: Apache ActiveMQ Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
threats.description: Apache ActiveMQ contains an improper input validation vulnerability that allows for code injection.
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects ActiveMQ. CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: JetBrains TeamCity Relative Path Traversal Vulnerability
threats.description: JetBrains TeamCity contains a relative path traversal vulnerability that could allow limited admin actions to be performed.
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects TeamCity. CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: Quest KACE Systems Management Appliance (SMA) Improper Authentication Vulnerability
threats.description: Quest KACE Systems Management Appliance (SMA) contains an improper authentication vulnerability that could allow attackers to impersonate legitimate users without valid credentials.
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects KACE Systems Management Appliance (SMA). CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Storing Passwords in a Recoverable Format Vulnerability
threats.description: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains a storing passwords in a recoverable format vulnerability that allows an authenticated, local attacker to gain DCA user privileges by accessing a credential file for the DCA user on the filesystem as a low-privileged user.
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects Catalyst SD-WAN Manager. CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) Cross-site Scripting Vulnerability
threats.description: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) contains a cross-site scripting vulnerability that could allow attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript within the user's session, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive information.
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS). CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: PaperCut NG/MF Improper Authentication Vulnerability
threats.description: PaperCut NG/MF contains an improper authentication vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to bypass authentication on affected installations via the SecurityRequestFilter class.
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects NG/MF. CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: Kentico Xperience Path Traversal Vulnerability
threats.description: Kentico Xperience contains a path traversal vulnerability that could allow an authenticated user's Staging Sync Server to upload arbitrary data to path relative locations.
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects Kentico Xperience. CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor Vulnerability
threats.description: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains an exposure of sensitive information to an unauthorized actor vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to view sensitive information on affected systems.
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects Catalyst SD-WAN Manager. CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.

threats.title: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Incorrect Use of Privileged APIs Vulnerability
threats.description: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains an incorrect use of privileged APIs vulnerability due to improper file handling on the API interface of an affected system. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by uploading a malicious file on the local file system. A successful exploit could allow the attacker to overwrite arbitrary files on the affected system and gain vmanage user privileges.
threats.ai_summary: This critical severity vulnerability affects Catalyst SD-WAN Manger. CVSS Score: 9.0. Exploit is available - immediate patching required.
